posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi releases a statement after Iranian strikes on Kuwait.

“Our Armed Forces are conducting self-defense strikes on sites the U.S. is permitted to use to attack civilian shipping and violate the ceasefire.

Any hostile act will be met with an immediate, decisive response. What sanctions and war failed to achieve won't be won with more war,” he says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
